pages.title: Main Topics Survey
pages.description:
Welcome to the Axialent AFNs 'Gym' main topics survey.
To ensure our sessions meet your needs, we are conducting this survey to check which are the most interesting and relevant topics you would like us to include in this initiative.

headings.heading: Please indicate your Top 3 topics in order of preference (1 being your favourite topic)

rows.text: Raise the bar on Personal Productivity

headings.heading:
We´d also love to hear from you regarding any additional topics that you consider relevant for us to include in our program.
Please share these topics so that we can take them into account.

answers.text: Building in theme of immunity to change, how to unlock executive sponsorship when this is a barrier to change
Designing activities to work with other mindsets for example abundance and scarcity
How to handle rising aggressiveness (social and biz environment)
Nothing comes to mind at the moment

For all of them I am curious how to put them into the bigger  context of culture/impact on the business itself and the environment and people. We see california in flames the usa in turmoil, far right on the move in multiple countries.. geopolitical tensions. How do they influence leaders; and how do they benefit from any of those practices above?
It is already very rich. Thanks for this proposal

One topic I would suggest is 'Adaptive Leadership in Times of Uncertainty,' focusing on navigating change, fostering resilience, and empowering teams to thrive in dynamic environments. This could complement the existing themes and provide valuable insights for today’s challenges.
Team coaching: Methodology and dinamics to coach teams
Establishing Trust and Resolving Conflicts in a Corporate Environment
